text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! I finish exquisitely once<n>again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Do not lament so, my dear Vodka!<n>You fell to none
other than me, an<n>insurmountable foe.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
From the start, my running was not<n>only
impeccable—it was flawless.<n>Compound that with
my Overlord<n>Training and...

Here I stand! Having climbed another<n>level, having
reached a new height of<n>excellence!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Listen well, for it was crafted by my<n>trainer
specifically for me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Keenly designed to account for my<n>unique
physique, it allows my<n>radiance to grow brighter
by the day!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! I guess a good trainingregimen really does makes thedifference!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's gotta be so cool to get that kind<n>of advice from
your very own trainer.
choice_data_list: Effort is what makes the difference.
Effort is what makes the difference.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just so... Thus, so have your own<n>abilities
improved tenfold through<n>your daily devotion to
me, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am the driving force of not only my<n>own growth,
but of my trainer's as<n>well!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hark! Behold the awe-inspiring<n>wonder that is I!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't feel like a compliment, but I<n>suppose
that's T.M. Opera O's way<n>of saying she likes my
training<n>methods.
